steps.title: Surgewave Connect Framework
steps.text: Surgewave Connect is a distributed data integration framework compatible with the Kafka Connect API. It enables scalable, fault-tolerant data pipelines between Surgewave and external systems.

steps.title: Connector Ecosystem
steps.text: Surgewave ships with 113+ connectors for databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra), cloud storage (S3, Azure Blob, GCS), messaging systems (RabbitMQ, NATS, MQTT), and many more.

steps.title: Plugin Architecture
steps.text: Connectors are loaded as plugins from a configurable directory. Use the collect-connectors.ps1 script to gather connector DLLs after building.

steps.title: Build Your Own
steps.text: Create custom connectors by implementing the source or sink connector interface. Check the Custom Connectors guide for a step-by-step walkthrough.
